zh-CN.suitableFor: 日常问答、短文草稿、入门编程提问、学习辅导；需要插件/项目在少数场景下可扩展工作流。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 强合规离线环境、必须可审计的长链路自动化、对单一厂商零依赖的架构。
zh-CN.compareHint: 若偏重长 PDF / 代码库通读，可对比 Claude；若要检索引用式答案，可对比 Perplexity 类产品。
checklistItems: 确认账号区服的模型版本与联网能力
对外使用前先读数据与留痕政策
关键输出与其他来源交叉验证

gscParagraphs.heading: ChatGPT 免费版和付费版差在哪里？
gscParagraphs.body: 通常差异在模型版本、速率、上下文长度与高级功能。具体以 ChatGPT 官网定价页为准，且可能随时间调整。

gscParagraphs.heading: 国内/国外大模型怎么选？
gscParagraphs.body: 结合数据合规、网络可用性、中文效果与生态集成。可在本分类页横向打开多款产品页面比较简介与官网链接。

en.suitableFor: Daily Q&A, drafting, beginner coding help, and tutoring; projects/plugins extend a few workflows.
en.notIdealFor: Air-gapped compliance, fully audit-proof automation, or architectures that must avoid a single vendor.
en.compareHint: For huge PDFs/repos, compare Claude; for citation-first answers, compare Perplexity-style tools.
checklistItems: Check model tier, region, and web browsing availability
Review data logging before sharing sensitive material

gscParagraphs.heading: ChatGPT free vs paid—what changes?
gscParagraphs.body: Plans usually differ by model tier, rate limits, and context windows. Pricing pages are authoritative and change often.

gscParagraphs.heading: How do I choose between chat assistants?
gscParagraphs.body: Start with compliance, language quality, integrations, and pricing. Browse peer tools in this category before deciding.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 长文档摘要、代码审阅、结构化长回复；适合「一口气读完再下结论」的任务。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 必须与特定办公套件深度绑定的场景；或需要强制联网实时报价类检索。
zh-CN.compareHint: 与 ChatGPT 比，通常更谨慎、解释更细；按任务准备相同 prompt 做 A/B。
checklistItems: 核对当前上下文长度与资费档位
上传敏感合同/代码前评估数据条款
输出若用于决策，保留原文摘录备查

gscParagraphs.heading: Claude 免费版和付费版差在哪里？
gscParagraphs.body: 通常差异在模型版本、速率、上下文长度与高级功能。具体以 Claude 官网定价页为准，且可能随时间调整。

gscParagraphs.heading: 国内/国外大模型怎么选？
gscParagraphs.body: 结合数据合规、网络可用性、中文效果与生态集成。可在本分类页横向打开多款产品页面比较简介与官网链接。

en.suitableFor: Long-document work, code review, and structured explanations where breadth matters.
en.notIdealFor: Tight coupling to a specific office suite or guaranteed live market prices.
en.compareHint: Often more cautious and verbose vs ChatGPT—benchmark on identical prompts.
checklistItems: Confirm context window and pricing tier
Review data handling for confidential uploads
Keep source excerpts when outputs inform decisions

gscParagraphs.heading: Claude free vs paid—what changes?
gscParagraphs.body: Plans usually differ by model tier, rate limits, and context windows. Pricing pages are authoritative and change often.

gscParagraphs.heading: How do I choose between chat assistants?
gscParagraphs.body: Start with compliance, language quality, integrations, and pricing. Browse peer tools in this category before deciding.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 需要带来源提示的检索式问答、研报速览、快速核对事实。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 离线环境、或要求 100% 不触网的内网流程。
zh-CN.compareHint: 与传统搜索引擎联用：用作「先读摘要再点源站」的一层，而不是唯一真相。
checklistItems: 点进原始链接核实上下文
注意付费墙与摘要误差
对医疗/法律等高风险命题二次确认

gscParagraphs.heading: Perplexity 的答案可靠吗？
gscParagraphs.body: 检索增强类答案应视为起点而非终稿；请阅读原文并交叉比对权威来源。Perplexity 的抓取范围以官方说明为准。

gscParagraphs.heading: 研究型 AI 与传统搜索如何配合？
gscParagraphs.body: 可用 AI 做速览与关键词扩展，用传统搜索做精确站点与文件类型检索，两者互补。

en.suitableFor: Answer-first research with cited sources, quick market or news scanning.
en.notIdealFor: Offline-only workflows or strictly air-gapped research.
en.compareHint: Pair with classic search: use as a skim layer, then verify originals.
checklistItems: Watch for paywalled or misquoted snippets

gscParagraphs.heading: How trustworthy is Perplexity?
gscParagraphs.body: Treat AI answers as starting points; verify with primary documents. Crawl coverage is defined by the vendor.

gscParagraphs.heading: Pairing research AI with classic search
gscParagraphs.body: Use assistants for summaries and query expansion, then use search for precise site: filters and file types.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 概念视觉、风格化插画、探索性视觉方向；社区灵感多。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 要求像素级可复现与严格角色一致的商业流水线（需额外流程）。
zh-CN.compareHint: 若要更强界面控制或企业合同条款，可对比 Adobe Firefly、SD 系托管。
checklistItems: 保存提示词与种子值（若产品提供）
品牌项目预留法务审图环节

gscParagraphs.heading: Midjourney 生成的图可以商用吗？
gscParagraphs.body: 能否商用取决于 Midjourney 当前套餐与许可协议，可能因地区或账号类型不同。请务必在官网查阅最新条款，重要投放前让法务二次确认。

gscParagraphs.heading: 文生图工具怎么对比？
gscParagraphs.body: 从提示可控性、参考图/风格迁移、分辨率与 API 三方面试用。本页汇总同分类工具，便于打开多个详情页比较。

en.suitableFor: Stylized visuals, concept art, and exploratory directions with a strong community.
en.notIdealFor: Pix-perfect repeatability without extra pipeline discipline.
en.compareHint: For corporate licensing or UI-led control, also review Firefly or hosted SD offerings.
checklistItems: Run brand/legal review before public release

gscParagraphs.heading: Can I use Midjourney images commercially?
gscParagraphs.body: Commercial use depends on the vendor’s current license and plan—it varies by region. Always read the official terms before production launches.

gscParagraphs.heading: How do I compare image generators?
gscParagraphs.body: Test prompt control, reference images, resolution, and batch/API paths. This category page links to peer tools for quick side-by-side browsing.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 在 IDE 内写代码、重构、解释仓库；适合已习惯 VS Code 分支的开发者。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 禁止任何云辅助的代码环境、或仅允许指定自托管模型的团队。
zh-CN.compareHint: 与 GitHub Copilot、Windsurf 等同仓对比：看索引质量、隐私开关与价格。
checklistItems: 设置索引/上传范围，避免敏感路径进入云
团队统一 code style 与评审流程
大改前先跑测试与 diff 审查

gscParagraphs.heading: Cursor 会拿走我的代码吗？
gscParagraphs.body: 是否上传训练、保留多久因产品与设置而异。请阅读 Cursor 安全/隐私文档并在团队内统一配置。

gscParagraphs.heading: 编程助手如何提高接受率？
gscParagraphs.body: 明确代码风格、测试要求与提交规范；把助手当「草稿生成器」，审查与测试仍由人负责。

en.suitableFor: IDE-native coding, refactors, and repo explanations for VS Code–style users.
en.notIdealFor: Environments forbidding cloud assistants or only approved self-hosted models.
en.compareHint: Benchmark vs Copilot/Windsurf on indexing, privacy toggles, and price.
checklistItems: Restrict indexed paths for sensitive trees
Keep human review on large diffs
Run tests before merging AI refactors

gscParagraphs.heading: Does Cursor train on my code?
gscParagraphs.body: Policies differ by plan and settings. Read the security page and enforce team-wide configuration.

gscParagraphs.heading: Getting real value from coding AI
gscParagraphs.body: Define style, tests, and review expectations; treat suggestions as drafts, not merges.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 团队 wiki、项目看板与轻量数据库合一；适合中小团队快速统一写法。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 极端离线场景、或需要复杂本地优先同步策略的个人笔记。
zh-CN.compareHint: 若以本地 Markdown 为先，可看 Obsidian；若以表格自动化为先，可对比 Airtable 类。
checklistItems: 理清工作区权限与对外分享边界
导出策略与格式（Markdown/PDF）提前验证
关键流程仍保留审批与备份

gscParagraphs.heading: Notion 和本地笔记（如 Obsidian）怎么选？
gscParagraphs.body: 云协作/wiki 赢在权限与共享；本地优先赢在文件可控。可按团队规模与合规二选一或混用。

gscParagraphs.heading: 企业知识库失败常见原因？
gscParagraphs.body: 权限混乱、命名不统一、没有过期策略。上线前约定模板与 owner，比盲目堆功能更重要。

en.suitableFor: Team wikis, light databases, and project views in one workspace.
en.notIdealFor: Strict offline-first note-taking or heavy local sync preferences.
en.compareHint: Markdown-first users may prefer Obsidian; heavy automation tables may need dedicated DB tools.

gscParagraphs.heading: Notion vs local-first notes
gscParagraphs.body: Hosted wikis excel at permissions; local editors excel at file control. Mixing both is common.

gscParagraphs.heading: Why knowledge bases stall
gscParagraphs.body: Unclear ownership and naming hurt more than missing features—establish templates before scaling.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 自托管或云托管的流程编排、API  glue、跨 SaaS 连接；对开发者友好。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 完全零维护要求、且不愿碰任何基础设施的角色。
zh-CN.compareHint: 与 Zapier/Make 比：自由度与运维成本通常更高；先评估错误监控与密钥管理。
checklistItems: 为关键流加重试与安全回退
记录审计轨迹满足内控要求

gscParagraphs.heading: n8n 和 Zapier 有什么区别？
gscParagraphs.body: 差异通常在连接器数量、自托管能力、定价模型与开发者体验。请对照官网连接器目录与计价说明。

gscParagraphs.heading: 自动化上线前必做什么？
gscParagraphs.body: 沙箱演练失败路径，确认幂等与补偿策略；生产再逐步放大流量。

en.suitableFor: Self or cloud-hosted automation, API glue, and SaaS bridging for technical teams.
en.notIdealFor: Hands-off users who cannot operate any infrastructure.
en.compareHint: Versus Zapier/Make: more control, more ops—plan retries, secrets, and observability.
checklistItems: Keep audit logs where compliance demands

gscParagraphs.heading: n8n vs other automation tools
gscParagraphs.body: Differentiators include connector breadth, self-hosting, pricing, and developer UX—verify on official pages.

gscParagraphs.heading: Before shipping automations
gscParagraphs.body: Rehearse failure modes, idempotency, and compensating transactions before scaling load.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 正式文体、多语言邮件与文档的快速机翻底线质量较高场景。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 涉密文本禁止外发翻译、或需逐句术语锁死的流水线（需企业方案或 CAT）。
zh-CN.compareHint: 与沉浸式翻译等浏览器方案互补：前者重文档，后者重网页浏览效率。
checklistItems: 检查是否允许上传该文件类型与体量
对外稿件仍安排人工终审
记录术语表版本以免漂移

gscParagraphs.heading: DeepL 翻译准确吗？
gscParagraphs.body: 机翻适合快速理解与时效稿件，正式对外发布仍建议人工校对，尤其是品牌名与法律条款。

gscParagraphs.heading: 沉浸式翻译和文档翻译怎么配合？
gscParagraphs.body: 浏览场景用浏览器扩展效率高；长文档用专注翻译服务更稳。可按场景组合多种工具。

en.suitableFor: High-quality baseline machine translation for documents and formal comms.
en.notIdealFor: Text that must never leave your perimeter without enterprise guarantees.
en.compareHint: Pair with in-browser translators for skimming, DeepL for polished drafts.
checklistItems: Confirm allowed formats and size limits

gscParagraphs.heading: Is DeepL accurate enough?
gscParagraphs.body: Great for speed; still human-review customer, legal, or medical copy before release.

gscParagraphs.heading: Mixing browser and document translators
gscParagraphs.body: Use extensions for skimming and dedicated tools for long exports—combine by workflow.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 短片创意、粗剪辅助与部分生成式视频实验。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 长院线级调色流程、或零预算必须完全离线渲染。
zh-CN.compareHint: 与 Pika、开源视频模型托管等对比：看分辨率档位、批量与 API。
checklistItems: 核对素材与成片的商用授权
留意生成内容的肖像权与标识要求
大项目拆分版本管理与渲染队列

gscParagraphs.heading: Runway 适合做抖音/短视频吗？
gscParagraphs.body: 多数产品面向社交短视频与广告小样，具体模板与导出比例见官网。注意平台对 AI 内容的披露规则。

gscParagraphs.heading: 视频类 AI 成本怎么控？
gscParagraphs.body: 按分辨率与分钟数计费的产品居多；可用低分辨率试片通过后再升档渲染。

en.suitableFor: Short-form creative edits and generative video experiments.
en.notIdealFor: Finishing-theatrical pipelines or offline-only studios without budget.
en.compareHint: Compare Pika or hosted OSS video stacks on resolution tiers and APIs.
checklistItems: Verify commercial licensing for assets and outputs
Queue renders and version shots for bigger projects

gscParagraphs.heading: Is Runway good for short-form social?
gscParagraphs.body: Many tools target vertical formats; confirm templates and codecs on the official site plus platform AI rules.

gscParagraphs.heading: Controlling generative video cost
gscParagraphs.body: Start with low-res previews; upscale after creative approval when billing is per minute or pixel tier.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 界面协作、设计系统与交付标注的事实标准之一。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 印刷排版、重度矢量插画或可离线桌面优先的闭源政策冲突场景。
zh-CN.compareHint: 与 Canva 比：Figma 偏产品与工程协作；按受众选择。
checklistItems: 团队库权限与分支策略先定规矩
导出与代码连接（Design Tokens）对齐前端
定期归档过期组件避免堆积

gscParagraphs.heading: Figma 能做品牌设计系统吗？
gscParagraphs.body: 视产品而定：有的强在画布与组件，有的在演示叙事。请以官网功能清单为准并与设计负责人评估。

gscParagraphs.heading: 设计协作常见坑？
gscParagraphs.body: 组件过期不删、命名混乱、与设计令牌脱节。建立 owner 与过期策略能减少返工。

en.suitableFor: Collaborative UI design, systems, and dev handoff at scale.
en.notIdealFor: Print-first layouts or illustration-heavy vector work that needs desktop-only tools.
en.compareHint: Versus Canva: Figma skews product/engineering collaboration.

gscParagraphs.heading: Can Figma host a design system?
gscParagraphs.body: Capabilities vary—some excel at components, others at storytelling decks. Read feature lists and test with designers.

gscParagraphs.heading: Design ops pitfalls
gscParagraphs.body: Stale components and unclear naming slow teams; assign owners and sunset rules early.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 从大纲快速生成可演示的幻灯片与网页式 deck。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 品牌像素级苛刻、必须本地 PPT 母版锁死的项目。
zh-CN.compareHint: 与经典幻灯片工具链对比：换时间换一致性，按交付物决定。
checklistItems: 品牌字体/色板导入后统一检查
讲稿与幻灯片事实逐条核对
导出格式需与会议设备预演

gscParagraphs.heading: Gamma 适合写什么类型内容？
gscParagraphs.body: Gamma 面向写作与演示类场景，可用于文稿、摘要或 slide 叙事起草。具体模板、字数上限与价格以官网为准；重要稿件建议人工终校。

gscParagraphs.heading: 写作类 AI 工具怎么选？
gscParagraphs.body: 先区分营销短文、长报告与幻灯片三条需求，再看与现有办公套件、品牌模板是否兼容。本站同类工具内链便于横向比较，最终请在各官网核实条款。

en.suitableFor: Fast decks and narrative sites from rough outlines.
en.notIdealFor: Locked corporate PPT masters with pixel-brand police.
en.compareHint: Trade speed vs rigid templates—pick based on deliverable expectations.
checklistItems: Import brand tokens then audit slides

gscParagraphs.heading: What is Gamma used for?
gscParagraphs.body: Gamma targets writing and presentation workflows—drafts, summaries, or narrative slides. Limits, templates, and pricing are defined on the official site; keep humans in the loop for critical copy.

gscParagraphs.heading: How do I pick a writing AI?
gscParagraphs.body: Separate marketing snippets, long reports, and slide storytelling. Check office-suite fit and brand templates. Use in-category links here, then confirm policies on each vendor site.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 灵感片段、广告小样配乐与快速试听话稿。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 要求完全免版税且权利链 100% 透明的影视发行（需法务审）。
zh-CN.compareHint: 与 Udio 等对比试听风格与导出格式；商业用途以协议为准。
checklistItems: 阅读商用与再许可条款
发行级项目走专职音乐授权

gscParagraphs.heading: Suno 的语音可以用于商业项目吗？
gscParagraphs.body: 取决于套餐与声库协议；部分声音禁止二次分发或要求署名。以官网最新条款为准。

gscParagraphs.heading: 会议转写要注意隐私吗？
gscParagraphs.body: 涉及客户或员工对话时，先确认合规与留存政策，再做云上传或本地处理选择。

en.suitableFor: Sketch tracks, ad stingers, and fast creative exploration.
en.notIdealFor: Theatrical releases needing ironclad chain-of-title without legal review.
en.compareHint: Benchmark Udio and others on style breadth and stems.
checklistItems: Use traditional licensing for distribution-grade work

gscParagraphs.heading: Can I use Suno audio commercially?
gscParagraphs.body: Plans and voice packs set the rules—including attribution or redistribution bans. Verify on the official site.

gscParagraphs.heading: Privacy for meeting transcription
gscParagraphs.body: Confirm HR/legal policies before uploading customer or employee audio; consider on-device options when required.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 日常问答、rewrite、轻量代码与学习计划；Google Gemini 属于通用助手型产品。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 必须离线、必须单一厂商零绑定、或强审计闭环的自动化。
zh-CN.compareHint: 用相同 prompt 在少数候选间 A/B；关注上下文长度、联网与地区可用性。
checklistItems: 敏感内容阅读隐私政策

gscParagraphs.heading: Google Gemini 免费版和付费版差在哪里？
gscParagraphs.body: 通常差异在模型版本、速率、上下文长度与高级功能。具体以 Google Gemini 官网定价页为准，且可能随时间调整。

gscParagraphs.heading: 国内/国外大模型怎么选？
gscParagraphs.body: 结合数据合规、网络可用性、中文效果与生态集成。可在本分类页横向打开多款产品页面比较简介与官网链接。

en.suitableFor: General Q&A, rewriting, light coding, and study plans—Google Gemini is a broad assistant.
en.notIdealFor: Offline-only mandates or architectures that cannot depend on a hosted model.
en.compareHint: Benchmark a few vendors with identical prompts; compare context, browsing, regions.

gscParagraphs.heading: Google Gemini free vs paid—what changes?
gscParagraphs.body: Plans usually differ by model tier, rate limits, and context windows. Pricing pages are authoritative and change often.

gscParagraphs.heading: How do I choose between chat assistants?
gscParagraphs.body: Start with compliance, language quality, integrations, and pricing. Browse peer tools in this category before deciding.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 日常问答、rewrite、轻量代码与学习计划；Microsoft Copilot 属于通用助手型产品。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 必须离线、必须单一厂商零绑定、或强审计闭环的自动化。
zh-CN.compareHint: 用相同 prompt 在少数候选间 A/B；关注上下文长度、联网与地区可用性。
checklistItems: 敏感内容阅读隐私政策

gscParagraphs.heading: Microsoft Copilot 免费版和付费版差在哪里？
gscParagraphs.body: 通常差异在模型版本、速率、上下文长度与高级功能。具体以 Microsoft Copilot 官网定价页为准，且可能随时间调整。

gscParagraphs.heading: 开发者平台选型要点？
gscParagraphs.body: 看 API 稳定性、配额、多云/私有化选项与社区活跃度。本分类内工具可逐项打开比较。

en.notIdealFor: Consumers who want zero-configuration chat only.
en.compareHint: Inspect licenses, hardware needs, observability, and provenance statements.

gscParagraphs.heading: Can I self-host Hugging Face?
gscParagraphs.body: Some offerings are cloud-only; others ship containers or binaries. Read the deployment section in official docs.

gscParagraphs.heading: Evaluating developer platforms
gscParagraphs.body: Compare SLAs, quotas, private cloud options, and community health using in-category links here.

gscParagraphs.heading: Can I use DALL·E images commercially?

zh-CN.suitableFor: 抠图、修复、放大、局部重绘等像素编辑；remove.bg 适合需要「在现有图上改动」的流程。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 纯生成管线且不需要像素编辑时，可优先看图生图类产品。
zh-CN.compareHint: 注意批量、输出分辨率与是否破坏元数据；敏感图像谨慎上传。
checklistItems: 大批量任务先小样本试效果
检查导出是否满足印刷分辨率

gscParagraphs.heading: remove.bg 和图像生成工具有什么区别？
gscParagraphs.body: 编辑类强调在既有像素上修补或变换；生成类更侧重从文本出新图。remove.bg 的侧重请以官网功能列表为准。

gscParagraphs.heading: 抠图/修图类 API 值得上吗？
gscParagraphs.body: 若日处理量大或有自动化流水线，可对比官网 API 限额、单价与 SLA。开发与运营成本需一并估算。

en.suitableFor: Cutouts, cleanup, upscale, inpainting—remove.bg helps when you must change existing pixels.
en.notIdealFor: Pure text-to-image workflows that never retouch assets.
en.compareHint: Watch batch limits, DPI, metadata loss, and data residency.

gscParagraphs.heading: Editing vs generation—where does remove.bg fit?
gscParagraphs.body: Editors manipulate existing images; generators create new ones from prompts. Confirm feature focus on the vendor site.

gscParagraphs.heading: When is an editing API worth it?
gscParagraphs.body: High-volume pipelines should compare rate limits, unit pricing, and uptime. Factor engineering time into TCO.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 界面视觉、品牌模板与演示成稿；Canva（Magic Studio） 适合设计与演示交叉场景。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 大型印刷拼版与长篇幅排版仍以专业排版软件为主。
zh-CN.compareHint: 对照设计系统同步、组件库与交付给开发的标注链路。

gscParagraphs.heading: Canva（Magic Studio） 能做品牌设计系统吗？

gscParagraphs.heading: 设计协作常见坑？

gscParagraphs.heading: Can Canva（Magic Studio） host a design system?

gscParagraphs.body: Stale components and unclear naming slow teams; assign owners and sunset rules early.

gscParagraphs.heading: Can I use Udio audio commercially?

gscParagraphs.body: Confirm HR/legal policies before uploading customer or employee audio; consider on-device options when required.

gscParagraphs.heading: Obsidian 和本地笔记（如 Obsidian）怎么选？
gscParagraphs.body: 云协作/wiki 赢在权限与共享；本地优先赢在文件可控。可按团队规模与合规二选一或混用。

gscParagraphs.heading: 企业知识库失败常见原因？
gscParagraphs.body: 权限混乱、命名不统一、没有过期策略。上线前约定模板与 owner，比盲目堆功能更重要。

en.suitableFor: Team wikis and searchable knowledge—Obsidian helps retain organizational memory.
en.notIdealFor: Strict local-first workflows that reject cloud sync entirely.
en.compareHint: Test search quality, permissions, exports, retention, and audit trails.

gscParagraphs.heading: Obsidian vs local-first notes
gscParagraphs.body: Hosted wikis excel at permissions; local editors excel at file control. Mixing both is common.

gscParagraphs.heading: Why knowledge bases stall
gscParagraphs.body: Unclear ownership and naming hurt more than missing features—establish templates before scaling.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 跨 SaaS 连接、定时任务、Webhook 编排；Make 适合 glue 工作流。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 完全零运维且流程极度复杂的关键账务链路（需专门工程化）。

gscParagraphs.heading: Make 和 Zapier 有什么区别？
gscParagraphs.body: 差异通常在连接器数量、自托管能力、定价模型与开发者体验。请对照官网连接器目录与计价说明。

gscParagraphs.heading: 自动化上线前必做什么？
gscParagraphs.body: 沙箱演练失败路径，确认幂等与补偿策略；生产再逐步放大流量。

en.suitableFor: SaaS glue, schedules, webhooks—Make helps orchestrate integrations.
en.notIdealFor: Mission-critical finance flows without engineering rigor.
en.compareHint: Compare hosted vs self-managed, retries, rate limits, and lock-in.

gscParagraphs.heading: Make vs other automation tools
gscParagraphs.body: Differentiators include connector breadth, self-hosting, pricing, and developer UX—verify on official pages.

gscParagraphs.heading: Before shipping automations
gscParagraphs.body: Rehearse failure modes, idempotency, and compensating transactions before scaling load.

gscParagraphs.heading: 学生用 AI 查资料要注意什么？
gscParagraphs.body: 明确课程对生成内容的政策，标注引用来源，避免未经许可上传整篇版权论文。可与导师确认可接受的使用边界。

en.suitableFor: Literature scans, dataset discovery, lab notes—Weights & Biases speeds structured learning work.
en.notIdealFor: Replacing accredited coursework or redistributing paywalled full text.
en.compareHint: Cross-check with library portals and primary sources; follow citation style guides.

gscParagraphs.heading: Is Weights & Biases a Google Scholar replacement?
gscParagraphs.body: Most assistants complement classic indexes; coverage differs. Always open the primary source for claims.

gscParagraphs.heading: Responsible AI use for students
gscParagraphs.body: Follow institutional policy, cite sources, and do not upload restricted PDFs without permission.

checklistItems: 与前端对齐断点与状态

gscParagraphs.heading: Framer 能做品牌设计系统吗？
gscParagraphs.body: 视产品而定：有的强在画布与组件，有的在演示叙事。请以官网功能清单为准并与设计负责人评估。

gscParagraphs.heading: 设计协作常见坑？
gscParagraphs.body: 组件过期不删、命名混乱、与设计令牌脱节。建立 owner 与过期策略能减少返工。

en.suitableFor: Visual design plus polished decks—Framer spans design/presentation workflows.
en.notIdealFor: Long-print composing—dedicated layout apps may still win.
en.compareHint: Check design-token sync, libraries, and handoff clarity.

gscParagraphs.heading: Can Framer host a design system?
gscParagraphs.body: Capabilities vary—some excel at components, others at storytelling decks. Read feature lists and test with designers.

gscParagraphs.heading: Design ops pitfalls
gscParagraphs.body: Stale components and unclear naming slow teams; assign owners and sunset rules early.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 抠图、修复、放大、局部重绘等像素编辑；PhotoRoom 适合需要「在现有图上改动」的流程。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 纯生成管线且不需要像素编辑时，可优先看图生图类产品。
zh-CN.compareHint: 注意批量、输出分辨率与是否破坏元数据；敏感图像谨慎上传。
checklistItems: 大批量任务先小样本试效果
检查导出是否满足印刷分辨率

gscParagraphs.heading: PhotoRoom 和图像生成工具有什么区别？
gscParagraphs.body: 编辑类强调在既有像素上修补或变换；生成类更侧重从文本出新图。PhotoRoom 的侧重请以官网功能列表为准。

gscParagraphs.heading: 抠图/修图类 API 值得上吗？
gscParagraphs.body: 若日处理量大或有自动化流水线，可对比官网 API 限额、单价与 SLA。开发与运营成本需一并估算。

en.suitableFor: Cutouts, cleanup, upscale, inpainting—PhotoRoom helps when you must change existing pixels.
en.notIdealFor: Pure text-to-image workflows that never retouch assets.
en.compareHint: Watch batch limits, DPI, metadata loss, and data residency.

gscParagraphs.heading: Editing vs generation—where does PhotoRoom fit?
gscParagraphs.body: Editors manipulate existing images; generators create new ones from prompts. Confirm feature focus on the vendor site.

gscParagraphs.heading: When is an editing API worth it?
gscParagraphs.body: High-volume pipelines should compare rate limits, unit pricing, and uptime. Factor engineering time into TCO.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 团队 wiki、个人知识库、项目沉淀；ChatPDF 适合需要可搜索「组织记忆」的场景。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 强离线优先且不接受任何云同步的极致个人笔记流派。
zh-CN.compareHint: 试全文/向量混合搜索、权限模型与导出；评估留存与审计要求。
checklistItems: 划分工作区与对外空间
关键页面设定审核流程

gscParagraphs.heading: ChatPDF 和本地笔记（如 Obsidian）怎么选？
gscParagraphs.body: 云协作/wiki 赢在权限与共享；本地优先赢在文件可控。可按团队规模与合规二选一或混用。

gscParagraphs.heading: 企业知识库失败常见原因？
gscParagraphs.body: 权限混乱、命名不统一、没有过期策略。上线前约定模板与 owner，比盲目堆功能更重要。

en.suitableFor: Team wikis and searchable knowledge—ChatPDF helps retain organizational memory.
en.notIdealFor: Strict local-first workflows that reject cloud sync entirely.
en.compareHint: Test search quality, permissions, exports, retention, and audit trails.

gscParagraphs.heading: ChatPDF vs local-first notes
gscParagraphs.body: Hosted wikis excel at permissions; local editors excel at file control. Mixing both is common.

gscParagraphs.heading: Why knowledge bases stall
gscParagraphs.body: Unclear ownership and naming hurt more than missing features—establish templates before scaling.

zh-CN.suitableFor: 需要引用或片段溯源的研究型问答；Humata AI 适合「先摘要再跳原文」。
zh-CN.notIdealFor: 离线内网、或对网页抓取有严格合规限制的环境。
zh-CN.compareHint: 点进每一条引用核对上下文；财经医药等场景务必二次验证。

gscParagraphs.heading: Humata AI 的答案可靠吗？
gscParagraphs.body: 检索增强类答案应视为起点而非终稿；请阅读原文并交叉比对权威来源。Humata AI 的抓取范围以官方说明为准。

gscParagraphs.heading: 研究型 AI 与传统搜索如何配合？
gscParagraphs.body: 可用 AI 做速览与关键词扩展，用传统搜索做精确站点与文件类型检索，两者互补。

en.suitableFor: Citation-oriented answers—Humata AI helps skim sources before you open originals.
en.notIdealFor: Air-gapped research without approved retrieval channels.
en.compareHint: Open citations; watch paywall misreads; verify market/legal/medical facts.

gscParagraphs.heading: How trustworthy is Humata AI?
gscParagraphs.body: Treat AI answers as starting points; verify with primary documents. Crawl coverage is defined by the vendor.

gscParagraphs.heading: Pairing research AI with classic search
gscParagraphs.body: Use assistants for summaries and query expansion, then use search for precise site: filters and file types.

en.suitableFor: Remote workshops, review walls, roadmaps—Loom fits whenever the team needs a shared visual surface.
en.notIdealFor: Offline-only collaboration or orgs that block hosted whiteboards.
en.compareHint: Compare guest access, exports, SSO, and concurrent editor limits.

gscParagraphs.heading: Can Loom replace a physical whiteboard?
gscParagraphs.body: Hosted boards work for distributed sessions; quality depends on latency and features. Check official docs for limits on guests or objects.

gscParagraphs.heading: How should teams evaluate whiteboard tools?
gscParagraphs.body: Start with permissions, exports, and directory integrations. Browse this category for alternates, then validate compliance with IT.

gscParagraphs.heading: 会议转写要注意隐私吗？
gscParagraphs.body: 涉及客户或员工对话时，先确认合规与留存政策，再做云上传或本地处理选择。

gscParagraphs.heading: Granola 和本地笔记（如 Obsidian）怎么选？
gscParagraphs.body: 云协作/wiki 赢在权限与共享；本地优先赢在文件可控。可按团队规模与合规二选一或混用。

gscParagraphs.heading: 企业知识库失败常见原因？
gscParagraphs.body: 权限混乱、命名不统一、没有过期策略。上线前约定模板与 owner，比盲目堆功能更重要。

en.suitableFor: Team wikis and searchable knowledge—Granola helps retain organizational memory.
en.notIdealFor: Strict local-first workflows that reject cloud sync entirely.
en.compareHint: Test search quality, permissions, exports, retention, and audit trails.

gscParagraphs.heading: Granola vs local-first notes
gscParagraphs.body: Hosted wikis excel at permissions; local editors excel at file control. Mixing both is common.

gscParagraphs.heading: Why knowledge bases stall
gscParagraphs.body: Unclear ownership and naming hurt more than missing features—establish templates before scaling.
